resources.title: Tetragon Installation Documentation
resources.evidence_quote: From here, we're going to click on installation. Now we should note there are multiple ways to install Tetragon.

resources.title: Tetragon GitHub Releases
resources.evidence_quote: So from here, we can see that we can grab Tetragon from the GitHub releases.

resources.title: Tetragon Helm Chart
resources.evidence_quote: Now we're going to use Helm, so this isn't anything you haven't seen before. We add the repository, do an update, and ask it to install.
